metadata.title: The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt - Gwent Cards and Leaders (Base Game + Hearts of Stone + Blood and Wine)
metadata.language_note: Card names and rule text are kept in English because official/wiki source data is English; JSON field names are English for interoperability.
metadata.scope: Collectible Gwent card entries from The Witcher 3 base game, Hearts of Stone, and Blood and Wine. Non-collectible summoned token cards are included separately and excluded from collectible totals.
metadata.counting_method: collectible_card_instances: duplicate physical/checklist entries such as Arachas (1 of 3) and Skellige Storm (1 of 3) are counted separately; summoned tokens are not counted.

sources.name: gwentcards/gwentcards.github.io cards.csv
sources.used_for: collectible card list, expansions, factions, acquisition locations, image URLs, summary counts

sources.name: day-s-ea/API-Gwent gwentCard.json
sources.used_for: base-game and leader card rule details: type, row, strength, abilities, descriptions

sources.name: Official Witcher Wiki - Hearts of Stone cards
sources.used_for: Hearts of Stone non-leader and token rule details

sources.name: Official Witcher Wiki - Skellige deck
sources.used_for: Blood and Wine Skellige/Skellige Storm/token rule details

notes: Neutral includes weather/special cards and neutral heroes/units.
Blood and Wine adds the Skellige faction plus three Neutral Skellige Storm weather cards in the source checklist.
Bovine Defense Force and Hemdall are included under non_collectible_token_cards but excluded from summary totals.

Nilfgaard.name: Emhyr var Emreis: Emperor of Nilfgaard
Nilfgaard.leader_ability: Look at 3 random cards from your opponent's hand.

Nilfgaard.name: Emhyr var Emreis: His Imperial Majesty
Nilfgaard.leader_ability: Pick a Torrential Rain card from your deck and play it instantly.

Nilfgaard.name: Emhyr var Emreis: Invader of the North
Nilfgaard.leader_ability: Abilities that restore a unit to the battlefield restore a randomly-chosen unit. Affects both players.

Monsters.name: Eredin: Bringer of Death
Monsters.leader_ability: Restore a card from your discard pile to your hand.

Monsters.name: Eredin: Commander of the Red Riders
Monsters.leader_ability: Double the strength of all your Close Combat units (unless a Commander's Horn is also present on that row).

acquisition.details: Gwent: Velen Players, reward for completing the quest

Monsters.name: Eredin: King of the Wild Hunt
Monsters.leader_ability: Pick any weather card from your deck and play it instantly.

Northern Realms.name: Foltest: King of Temeria
Northern Realms.leader_ability: Pick an Impenetrable Fog card from your deck and play it instantly.

Northern Realms.name: Foltest: Lord Commander of the North
Northern Realms.leader_ability: Clear any weather effects (resulting from Biting Frost, Torrential Rain or Impenetrable Fog cards) in play.

acquisition.details: White Orchard Tavern, Innkeeperess (or Trader outside)

Northern Realms.name: Foltest: The Siegemaster
Northern Realms.leader_ability: Doubles the strength of all your Siege units (unless a Commander's Horn is also present on that row).

Northern Realms.name: Foltest: The Steel-Forged
Northern Realms.leader_ability: Destroy your enemy's strongest Siege unit(s) if the combined strength of all his or her Siege units is 10 or more.

Northern Realms.name: Foltest: Son of Medell
Northern Realms.leader_ability: Destroy your enemy's strongest Ranged Combat unit(s) if the combined strength of all his or her Ranged Combat units is 10 or more.

Skellige.leader_ability: Units only lose half their strength in bad weather conditions.

cards.name: Rainfarn
cards.description: You'll die as painfully as that pathetic traitor Windhalm did.

cards.name: Redanian Foot Soldier (1 of 2)
cards.description: I've bled for Redania! I've killed for Redania.. Dammit, I've even raped for Redania!

cards.name: Redanian Foot Soldier (2 of 2)
cards.description: I've bled for Redania! I've killed for Redania.. Dammit, I've even raped for Redania!

cards.name: Renuald aep Matsen
cards.description: They say the Impera fear nothing. Untrue. Renuald scares them shitless.

cards.name: Riordain
cards.description: Stare into their eyes, feast on their terror. Then go in for the kill.

cards.name: Rotten Mangonel
cards.description: The rotten smell brings back childhood memories.

cards.name: Sabrina Glevissig
cards.description: Daughter of the Kaedweni Wilderness.

cards.name: Saesenthessis
cards.description: Beautiful, pure, fierce - the perfect icon for a rebellion.

cards.name: Shilard Fitz-Oesterlen
cards.description: Warfare is mere sound and fury – diplomacy is what truly shapes history.

cards.description: Wielded correctly, a protractor can be a deadly weapon.

cards.name: Siege Technician
cards.description: I never miss twice.

cards.name: Siege Tower
cards.description: I love the clamor of siege towers in the morning. Sounds like victory.

cards.name: Siegfried of Denesle

cards.name: Sigismund Dijkstra
cards.description: Gwent's like politics, just more honest.

cards.name: Síle de Tansarville

cards.name: Stefan Skellen
cards.description: My mark scars the face of our future empress. That is my proudest achievement.

cards.name: Sweers
cards.description: And hands off the girl! Whatever we may be, we're not savages.

cards.name: Tibor Eggebracht
cards.description: Albaaaa! Forward!! Alba! Long live the Emperor!

cards.name: Trebuchet (1 of 2)

cards.name: Trebuchet (2 of 2)

cards.name: Triss Merigold

cards.description: A vile, bloodthirsty, man-eating hag. Kind of like my mother-in-law.

cards.name: Vampire: Ekimmara
cards.description: Who would think overgrown bats would have a taste for gaudy jewelry?

cards.name: Vampire: Fleder
cards.description: Higher vampires embrace their victims. Fleders rip them to shreds.

cards.name: Vampire: Garkain
cards.description: Blood-drinkers and corpse eaters so foul their very ugliness paralyses foes.

cards.name: Vampire: Katakan
cards.description: Drinking the blood of the Continent since the Conjunction.

cards.name: Vanhemar
cards.description: For a fire mage, he's not very... flamboyant.

cards.name: Vattier de Rideaux
cards.description: There's never been a problem a well-planned assassination couldn't solve.

cards.name: Vernon Roche
cards.description: A patriot... and a real son of a bitch.

cards.name: Ves
cards.description: Better to live one day as a king than a whole life as a beggar.

cards.name: Vesemir
cards.description: If you're to be hanged, ask for water. Anything can happen before they fetch it.

acquisition.details: Gwent: Big City Players, Hierarch Square, Bank of Vivaldi, Vimme Vivaldi

cards.name: Villentretenmerth
cards.description: Also calls himself Borkh Three Jackdaws… he's not the best at names.

cards.name: Vreemde
cards.description: Discipline is the Empire's deadliest weapon.

cards.name: Vrihedd Brigade Recruit
cards.description: Hatred burns brighter than any fire, and cuts deeper than any blade.

cards.name: Vrihedd Brigade Veteran (1 of 2)
cards.description: "Vrihedd? What's that mean?" "Trouble."

cards.name: Vrihedd Brigade Veteran (2 of 2)
cards.description: "Vrihedd? What's that mean?" "Trouble."

cards.name: Werewolf
cards.description: Wolves aren't as bad as they say. Werewolves, though – they're worse.

cards.name: Wyvern
cards.description: Imagine a cross between a winged snake and a nightmare. Wyverns are worse.

cards.name: Yaevinn
cards.description: We are the drops of rain that together make a ferocious storm.

cards.description: The world belongs to whoever's best at crackin' skulls and impregnatin' lasses.

cards.name: Yennefer of Vengerberg
cards.description: Magic is Chaos, Art and Science. It's a curse, a blessing and a progression.
